title: Bid Competition (higher CPM should win)
setup: Creates two campaigns on the same placement — Campaign A and Campaign B, with B priced higher — then drives traffic and counts wins.
expected_standard_behaviour: Higher-CPM Campaign B wins more auctions than Campaign A.
expected_verdict_vs_voise_adserver: PASS — decide_vast_ad ranks eligible campaigns by target_cpm (descending), so the higher bid wins. This is the one core behaviour the internal auction implements correctly.
